items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to 'Pay monthly regardless of attendance.' However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for monthly payments regardless of attendance, but there is no concrete evidence to support this, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
